response.global_analysis:
1. Reference Match: The song 'エアーマンが倒せない' matched the reference lyrics perfectly. The introductory talk was manually transcribed.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the reference lyrics for the song portion, while the intro talk was completely manually transcribed and translated.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed both speaking and singing precisely with the vocal waveforms. Standardized timecodes to MM:SS.mmm format. Rest periods and instrumental segments are silent.

subtitles.original: 目指せ！トレンド入り！よろしくなー！
subtitles.english: Aiming to trend! Let's make it happen!

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、ちょっと息が整ってないですけど、
subtitles.english: Alright! So, I'm a bit out of breath, but...

subtitles.original: さて、今年の生誕祭ライブ、テーマは『ゲームソングライブ』です！
subtitles.english: Now, the theme of this year's Birthday Live is "Game Song Live"!

subtitles.original: これまでたくさんやってきた、実況配信で一緒に遊んできた思い出のゲームや、
subtitles.english: I've packed in songs from memorable games we've played together in my many game streams,

subtitles.original: こよが大好きゲーム関連の楽曲を、たくさん詰め込みました！
subtitles.english: and game-related songs that I absolutely love!

subtitles.original: 最後まで全力で楽しんでいってね！
subtitles.english: Please enjoy it with all your might until the very end!

subtitles.original: ということで、1曲目は大好きなポケモンの『XYZ』を歌わせていただきました。ね！
subtitles.english: So, for the first song, I sang my beloved Pokemon song "XYZ." Right?

subtitles.original: じゅしゅくん、
subtitles.english: Josh-kun...

subtitles.original: 「俺はこいつと旅に出る」っていうことです。はい。
subtitles.english: It means "I'm going on a journey with this guy." Yes.

subtitles.original: XYZ、予想もみんなにたくさんしてもらってたんですけど、
subtitles.english: Many of you tried to guess my setlist, including "XYZ"...

subtitles.original: ポケモンの予想は結構多かったけど、XYZを当てられた人は結構少なかったです。
subtitles.english: And while many guessed Pokemon songs, very few guessed "XYZ" specifically.

subtitles.original: 当たった君、おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Congratulations to those who got it right!

subtitles.original: この曲は、Z-Aの発売になったっていうのもあるんですけど、歌詞がめっちゃ良くて、実はこよりにもぴったりな曲なので、選びました！
subtitles.english: I chose this song because of the "Legends: Z-A" announcement, but also because the lyrics are amazing and fit me perfectly!

subtitles.original: さあ、この後も、自分の予想が当たってるかなって、ドキドキしながら楽しんでいってください！
subtitles.english: I hope you'll continue to enjoy the show, excited to see if your other guesses are correct!

subtitles.original: 新3Dお披露目もあるからね！絶対に最後まで見てってね！
subtitles.english: We also have a new 3D outfit reveal coming up! Make sure to watch until the very end!

subtitles.original: それでは、そろそろ次の曲。
subtitles.english: Well then, it's about time for the next song.

subtitles.original: ゲームの世界へ、どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Welcome to the game world!

subtitles.original: 気がついたら
subtitles.english: I noticed

subtitles.original: 同じ面ばかりプレイ
subtitles.english: I'm playing the same level over and over

subtitles.original: そしていつも同じ場所で死ぬ
subtitles.english: And I always die in the same spot

subtitles.original: あきらめずに
subtitles.english: I don't give up,

subtitles.original: 消える足場に挑戦するけど
subtitles.english: I challenge the vanishing platforms

subtitles.original: すぐに下に落ちるよ
subtitles.english: But I fall down immediately

subtitles.original: アイテム2号があれば
subtitles.english: If I have Item 2,

subtitles.original: 楽に 向こうの岸までつくけど
subtitles.english: I can easily reach the other side

subtitles.original: 何回やっても
subtitles.english: But no matter how many times I try

subtitles.original: 何回やっても
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try
